exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your addiction family support forward
items: Create an emergency contact list with crisis hotlines, treatment centers, and support resources
Establish clear boundaries and safety protocols for when your loved one is actively using or in crisis
Research and contact local addiction treatment facilities to understand their intake process, insurance requirements, and availability
Develop a crisis intervention plan with specific steps to take when your loved one is experiencing an overdose or mental health emergency
Schedule an appointment with a family therapist or counselor who specializes in addiction to discuss intervention strategies
Remove or secure all potentially harmful items from your home including prescription medications, alcohol, sharp objects, and anything that could be used for self-harm
